arts.ttl: Chelsea 'made multiple approaches' for Serie A star with £67m price tag
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly made multiple enquiries to sign AC Milan goalkeeper Mike Maignan during the summer transfer window but were put off by his price tag.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer can be the face of the Premier League - Chelsea must help him make that happen
arts.sum: When Chelsea's players were put through their paces for the Premier League's media day over the summer, a cheeky Cole Palmer made a point to those filming and photographing him. The jump from stardom to superstardom cannot be far away for Palmer, who should now have his eyes set on becoming the Premier League's best player and most recognisable face.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer reacts to record-breaking Brighton win
arts.sum: Cole Palmer netted four goals past Brighton & Hove Albion in Chelsea's 4-2 win on Saturday and the England international believes he should've added more to his tally. However, it seems the four were not enough for Palmer, who believes he should've put five or six past Brighton.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer now joins Frank Lampard in Chelsea's history books for one thing
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has now joined Frank Lampard in Chelsea's history books for scoring four goals in two different games.

arts.ttl: Brighton star's agent issues contract warning after Roberto De Zerbi transfer phone call
arts.sum: Julio Enciso is into the final two years of his current Brighton contract and former boss Roberto De Zerbi is understood to have expressed an interest in bringing the 20-year-old attacker to Marseille

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Liverpool 'alerted' as Guehi hit with 'ULTIMATUM'
arts.sum: There has been a'significant development' regarding Marc Guehi's future as he has been handed an 'ultimatum' by Crystal Palace, according to a report. Guehi was outstanding at the tournament in Germany and subsequently became the subject of a transfer war between Crystal Palace and Newcastle .

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca spotted screaming at £100k-a-week Chelsea star vs Brighton
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca was spotted screaming at Mykhailo Mudryk in the second half during Chelsea vs Brighton.

arts.ttl: How is Samu Omorodion doing after failed Chelsea transfer?
arts.sum: Samu Omorodion has been prolific for Porto since his failed Chelsea transfer. How is Samu Omorodion doing after failed Chelsea transfer?

arts.ttl: Palmer steals the show with FOUR goals in Chelsea win
arts.sum: Palmer became the first player to score four goals before half-time in a single Premier League match, leading Enzo Maresca ’s side to a fourth straight victory in all competitions. Cole Palmer made Premier League history as Chelsea beat Brighton & Hove Albion 4-2 in a six-goal thriller at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Robert Sanchez takes to Instagram after mistake in Chelsea vs Brighton
arts.sum: Robert Sanchez has broken the silence on Instagram after a mistake in Chelsea vs Brighton which led to the first goal.
